title: Synthetic Type 2 Diabetes Patient Journey
description: End-to-end patient journey dataset for Type 2 Diabetes including diagnosis, HbA1c monitoring, medication titration, and complication tracking.

id: Synthea Synthetic FHIR R4 Patient Cohort
title: Synthea Synthetic FHIR R4 Patient Cohort
description: Synthetic longitudinal patient records generated by Synthea 3.3.0 for Massachusetts. Includes demographics, encounters, conditions, observations, and medication requests in FHIR R4 format, transformed to OMOP CDM Layer 4.

title: OMOP CDM v5.4 Analytics Warehouse
description: OMOP Common Data Model v5.4 analytics warehouse with standardized clinical data from FHIR R4 sources.

title: Prostate Cancer Multi-Centre Registry
description: Federated registry of prostate cancer outcomes with TNM staging, Gleason scores, treatment protocols in FHIR R4.

title: Synthea Synthetic FHIR R4 Patient Cohort
description: Synthetic longitudinal patient records generated by Synthea 3.3.0 for Massachusetts. Includes demographics, encounters, conditions, observations, and medication requests in FHIR R4 format, transformed to OMOP CDM Layer 4.

title: OMOP CDM v5.4 Analytics Warehouse
description: OMOP Common Data Model v5.4 analytics warehouse. Contains standardized clinical data mapped from FHIR R4 sources for epidemiological research and drug safety surveillance.

title: Prostate Cancer Multi-Centre Registry
description: Federated registry of prostate cancer outcomes from participating EHDS data holders. Includes TNM staging, Gleason scores, treatment protocols, and 5-year survival data in HL7 FHIR R4 format.

title: Synthetic Type 2 Diabetes Patient Journey
description: End-to-end patient journey dataset for Type 2 Diabetes including diagnosis, HbA1c monitoring, medication titration, and complication tracking.

title: FHIR Encounter History Collection
description: Longitudinal encounter records including emergency, inpatient, outpatient, and ambulatory visits. Linked to Practitioner and Location resources for care pathway analysis.

title: FHIR Diagnostic Reports
description: Diagnostic report resources including radiology, pathology, and laboratory reports with linked Observation results and specimen references.

title: FHIR Care Plan Registry
description: Structured CarePlan resources for chronic disease management. Includes treatment goals, scheduled activities, care team assignments, and outcome measures.

title: FHIR Condition Problem List
description: Active and resolved condition resources mapped to SNOMED CT and ICD-10 codes. Includes onset dates, severity, verification status, and clinical staging.

title: FHIR Medication Request Dataset
description: MedicationRequest resources covering prescriptions, dosage instructions, refill history, and drug interaction alerts. Coded with RxNorm and ATC classification.

title: FHIR Immunization Records
description: Immunization resources including COVID-19, influenza, and childhood vaccination records with batch numbers and EU Digital COVID Certificate alignment.

title: FHIR AllergyIntolerance Registry
description: AllergyIntolerance resources documenting drug allergies, food intolerances, and environmental sensitivities with SNOMED CT substance codes.

title: FHIR Procedure Bundle
description: Procedure resources documenting surgical interventions, diagnostic procedures, and therapeutic treatments with SNOMED CT codes and body sites.

title: FHIR Observation Vitals and Lab Results
description: Observation resources spanning vital signs and laboratory results. Coded with LOINC and linked to Encounter and Patient resources.

title: FHIR Cohort Search Bundle
description: Pre-built FHIR Bundle resources for epidemiological cohort queries. Supports population-level analytics including disease prevalence and outcome stratification.

title: Federated HealthDCAT-AP Catalog
description: Aggregated HealthDCAT-AP metadata catalog combining dataset descriptions from all EHDS participating data holders for cross-border health data access.

title: MedDRA v27.0 Adverse Event Classification
description: Medical Dictionary for Regulatory Activities (MedDRA) v27.0 adverse event terminology mapped to FHIR R4 AdverseEvent resources. Covers System Organ Classes (SOC), High-Level Group Terms (HLGT), High-Level Terms (HLT), Preferred Terms (PT), and Lowest Level Terms (LLT) for pharmacovigilance signal detection and ICSR reporting.

title: Clinical Trial Phases I–IV Metadata Registry
description: Structured metadata for multi-phase clinical trials (Phase I safety, Phase II efficacy, Phase III comparative, Phase IV post-market surveillance). Includes EudraCT numbers, trial endpoints, investigator sites, enrolment targets, and FHIR R4 ResearchStudy/ResearchSubject resource mappings aligned with ICH E6(R3) GCP guidelines.
